Every day, WITI’s group chats buzz with fresh links. As part of our new Saturday send for paid readers, we’re rounding up 11 of the best.
It’s WITI, on the weekend.
Why are these interesting?
The New Murakami Novel Sounds Like A Nolan Film [ https://substack.com/redirect/aa62eb56-b23f-4b12-892f-990148890272?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (Penguin)

Why Are Chinese Youth Chasing A “Low Desire Life”? [ https://substack.com/redirect/052895d2-6d9c-4a3b-826e-32cc78ac521c?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (Jing Daily)
